ogTitle: York Plains vs Youarang: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in York Plains and Youarang.
heading: York Plains vs Youarang — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between York Plains, Victoria and Youarang, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Youarang has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to York Plains (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is York Plains or Youarang safer from flooding?
faq.answer: York Plains has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Youarang scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: York Plains scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Youarang scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in York Plains or Youarang?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Youarang has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
